overview: Premium 3D animated website for UN Makeover by professional makeup artist Utkarsha Nakti Patil based in Gauripada, Kalyan, Maharashtra. Features luxury bridal and celebrity makeup services with immersive Three.js animations and glassmorphism design.
features: Full 3D hero with Three.js particle effects and floating golden gems
All 9 portfolio photos of Utkarsha's work including Maharashtrian bridal looks
Services, gallery, celebrity clientele, testimonials, FAQ and CTA sections
Beige and brown luxury theme with glow and blur effects
Floating WhatsApp and Instagram contact buttons
Google Maps embed for Gauripada, Kalyan location
